get.summary: Get the attendance logs for an event (session attendance not included).

parameters.name: lastUpdatedAfter
parameters.description: Include attendance logs updated after this date

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Number of check in records to retrieve (1 - 200)

200.description: Returns a list of attendance logs.

get.summary: Get the attendance logs for a session

parameters.name: lastUpdatedAfter
parameters.description: Include attendance logs updated after this date

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Number of check in records to retrieve (1 - 200)

200.description: Returns a list of attendance logs.

parameters.name: updatedAfter
parameters.description: Include lists updated after this date (UTC)

parameters.name: updatedAfter
parameters.description: Include contacts last updated after this date (UTC)

parameters.name: addedAfter
parameters.description: Include orders added after this date (UTC)
